i.e. On Sunday, the first Yama is Kala (Yama of Sun),
second yama is Paridhi (yama of Moon) and so on. On Sunday
night the first Yama is Yemakandaka (yama of Jupiter), second
is Yamasukra (Yama ofVenus) and so on; as we have stated
earlier.

32 Secrets ofB irth Time Rectification
The relevant Yama of Saturn (Gulika) which is of our
concern would be the 7th on Sunday 6th on Monday and so
on. i.e. the Yama numbers 7, 6, 5, 4, 3, 2, I from Sunday
onwards is termed Gulika. It is the beginning moment of this
Yama that is termed Gulika, the momentary influence. Please
don't confuse Gulika the span of time, and Gulika the
momentary influence of special importance, at the beginning
point of this span of time. They both are known by the same
name and the second, Gulika the momentary influence -
Kshenika Graha - is of special importance to us in birth time
rectification, and not the Gulika - the Yama of Saturn. To
